name: Storage account allows HTTP traffic
description: A storage account does not enforce HTTPS-only transfers. Data in transit over HTTP is not encrypted, exposing blobs, files, queues, and tables to interception attacks (MITM).
remediation: Enable 'Secure transfer required' on all storage accounts: Azure Portal → Storage Account → Configuration → Secure transfer required → Enabled. Enforce at scale via Azure Policy (built-in policy: 'Secure transfer to storage accounts should be enabled').
